CHECK (((event_type)::text = ANY ((ARRAY['deposit_paid'::character varying, 'deposit_point_granted'::character varying, 'deposit_forfeited'::character varying, 'deposit_refund_paid'::character varying, 'reward_due'::character varying, 'reward_paid'::character varying])::text[])))

CHECK (((cancelled_by IS NULL) OR ((cancelled_by)::text = ANY ((ARRAY['customer'::character varying, 'agent'::character varying, 'admin'::character varying])::text[]))))
CHECK (((no_show_by IS NULL) OR ((no_show_by)::text = ANY (ARRAY[('customer'::character varying)::text, ('agent'::character varying)::text]))))

CHECK ((status = ANY (ARRAY[('requested'::character varying)::text, ('pending'::character varying)::text, ('confirmed'::character varying)::text, ('visited'::character varying)::text, ('contracted'::character varying)::text, ('cancelled'::character varying)::text, ('no_show'::character varying)::text])))

FOREIGN KEY (agent_id) REFERENCES profiles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
FOREIGN KEY (property_id) REFERENCES properties(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

CHECK (((open_end IS NULL) OR (((open_end ~ '^\d{4}-(0[1-9]|1[0-2])$'::text) AND (to_char((to_date((open_end || '-01'::text), 'YYYY-MM-DD'::text))::timestamp with time zone, 'YYYY-MM'::text) = open_end)) OR ((open_end ~ '^\d{4}-(0[1-9]|1[0-2])-(0[1-9]|[12]\d|3[01])$'::text) AND (to_char((to_date(open_end, 'YYYY-MM-DD'::text))::timestamp with time zone, 'YYYY-MM-DD'::text) = open_end)))))

CHECK (((open_start IS NULL) OR (open_end IS NULL) OR (to_date(
CASE
    WHEN (length(open_start) = 7) THEN (open_start || '-01'::text)
    ELSE open_start
END, 'YYYY-MM-DD'::text) <= to_date(
CASE
    WHEN (length(open_end) = 7) THEN (open_end || '-01'::text)
    ELSE open_end
END, 'YYYY-MM-DD'::text))))

CHECK (((open_start IS NULL) OR (((open_start ~ '^\d{4}-(0[1-9]|1[0-2])$'::text) AND (to_char((to_date((open_start || '-01'::text), 'YYYY-MM-DD'::text))::timestamp with time zone, 'YYYY-MM'::text) = open_start)) OR ((open_start ~ '^\d{4}-(0[1-9]|1[0-2])-(0[1-9]|[12]\d|3[01])$'::text) AND (to_char((to_date(open_start, 'YYYY-MM-DD'::text))::timestamp with time zone, 'YYYY-MM-DD'::text) = open_start)))))
FOREIGN KEY (properties_id) REFERENCES properties(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
CHECK ((((kind = ANY (ARRAY['main'::text, 'gallery'::text])) AND (unit_type_id IS NULL)) OR ((kind = 'floor_plan'::text) AND (unit_type_id IS NOT NULL))))
